info.name: Sanmati Production Automation / MES API
info.description:
Complete REST API for the Sanmati MES backend, grouped by module.

## Getting started
1. Set the `baseUrl` collection variable if your server is not on http://localhost:4000.
2. Open **Auth → POST Login**, put a valid email/password in the body, and Send. A test script saves the JWT into the `token` variable automatically.
3. Every JWT-protected request then works — the collection sends `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` by default.

## Auth types
- **JWT Bearer** — most `/api/v1/*` routes. Uses `{{token}}`.
- **X-API-Key (machine)** — `/iot/v1/*` telemetry. Set the `machineApiKey` variable (shown once when a machine is created / key rotated).
- **X-API-Key (integration)** — `/integrations/v1/*` ERP push. Set the `integrationApiKey` variable (INTEGRATION_API_KEY in backend/.env).
- **Public** — login, refresh, `/health`, and open IoT `/iot/*` need no auth.

## Response envelope
Success: `{ "ok": true, "data": ... }`   Error: `{ "ok": false, "error": { "code", "message", "details?" } }`

request.description:
Liveness probe. Returns { ok: true, ts } directly (not the standard data envelope).

**Auth:** Public (no auth)

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "ts": 1783771169134
}
```

item.name: POST  Login with email and password
POST  Rotate refresh token and get a new access token
POST  Logout (revoke a single refresh token)

request.description:
Returns the current user (req.user) as resolved by the auth middleware: id, name, email, permissions, plantId, tokenVersion, etc.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "66f0a123b4c5d6e7f8012345",
    "name": "System Admin",
    "email": "admin@example.com",
    "employeeCode": "ADMIN",
    "plantId": "66f0a0001111222233334444",
    "roleSlugs": [
      "admin"
    ],
    "permissions": [
      "*:*"
    ]
  }
}
```

query.description: Plant to scope suggestions to; defaults to the authenticated user's plantId

request.description:
Returns AI/heuristic production suggestions for a plant. Read-only; no DB writes or socket emits. Scoped to the plantId from query or the authenticated user.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "type": "start_job",
      "salesOrderId": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",
      "orderNumber": "SO-LXR8Q2",
      "message": "Materials and machine available — ready to plan & schedule",
      "priority": "high"
    }
  ]
}
```

query.description: Plant to scope alerts to; defaults to the authenticated user's plantId

request.description:
Returns operational alerts (low inventory, overdue orders, machine issues) for a plant. Read-only. Scoped to the plantId from query or the authenticated user.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "type": "low_stock",
      "severity": "warning",
      "sku": "FILM-BOPP-20",
      "message": "BOPP Film 20 micron below reorder point",
      "onHand": 120,
      "reorderPoint": 500
    }
  ]
}
```

item.name: GET  Dashboard KPI overview for a plant

query.description: Plant to report on. Defaults to the authenticated user's plantId.

request.description:
Up to 50 notifications where resolved=false and the current user is not in dismissedBy, sorted by createdAt desc. Filtered to the user's plant when plantId is present.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "66f0b111c2d3e4f5a6b70011",
      "type": "machine_down",
      "severity": "critical",
      "title": "Machine EXT-01 down",
      "message": "Extruder EXT-01 tripped on overload",
      "resolved": false,
      "dismissedBy": [],
      "createdAt": "2026-07-13T06:20:00.000Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

item.name: POST  Dismiss a notification for the current user

request.description:
Marks the notification resolved (resolved=true, resolvedAt, resolvedBy) so everyone stops seeing it. 404 if not found. Side effect: emits 'notification:resolved' to the plant room. Returns the updated document.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "66f0b111c2d3e4f5a6b70011",
    "type": "machine_down",
    "title": "Machine EXT-01 down",
    "resolved": true,
    "resolvedAt": "2026-07-13T07:00:00.000Z",
    "resolvedBy": "66f0a123b4c5d6e7f8012345"
  }
}
```

query.description: Case-insensitive regex match on customer name

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of sales orders (scoped to the user's plant), each enriched with a derived productionStatus (notStarted/planned/inProgress/completed), jobsCount and a summary of linked jobs. Read-only.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `sales_orders:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",
      "orderNumber": "SO-LXR8Q2",
      "customer": "Acme Foods Pvt Ltd",
      "priority": "high",
      "status": "planning",
      "dueDate": "2026-07-20T00:00:00.000Z",
      "totalValue": 250000,
      "currency": "INR",
      "plantId": "665f0000000000000000aaaa",
      "lines": [
        {
          "_id": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c1a",
          "sku": "FILM-BOPP-20",
          "productName": "BOPP Printed Film",
          "qty": 1000,
          "uom": "kg",
          "status": "planned",
          "jobOrderIds": [
            "665f2b2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c2a"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "productionStatus": "inProgress",
      "jobsCount": 1,
      "jobs": [
        {
          "_id": "665f2b2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c2a",
          "orderNumber": "PB-001",
          "jobNumber": "JOB-7845",
          "status": "in_progress",
          "currentStageIndex": 1
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

Creates a manual sales order (auto-generates orderNumber SO-<base36> and externalId MANUAL-<epoch> when omitted). Resolves plantId from payload/user/first-plant fallback, writes an AuditLog entry, invalidates the sales_orders cache, and returns 201.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `sales_orders:create`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",
    "orderNumber": "SO-LXR8Q2",
    "customer": "Acme Foods Pvt Ltd",
    "priority": "high",
    "status": "new",
    "dueDate": "2026-07-20T00:00:00.000Z",
    "totalValue": 250000,
    "currency": "INR",
    "plantId": "665f0000000000000000aaaa",
    "lines": [
      {
        "_id": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c1a",
        "sku": "FILM-BOPP-20",
        "productName": "BOPP Printed Film",
        "qty": 1000,
        "uom": "kg",
        "status": "pending"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

item.name: GET  Get a sales order by id

request.description:
Returns a single sales order document by id. Read-only; responds 404 if not found.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `sales_orders:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",
    "orderNumber": "SO-LXR8Q2",
    "customer": "Acme Foods Pvt Ltd",
    "priority": "high",
    "status": "planning",
    "dueDate": "2026-07-20T00:00:00.000Z",
    "totalValue": 250000,
    "currency": "INR",
    "plantId": "665f0000000000000000aaaa",
    "lines": [
      {
        "_id": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c1a",
        "sku": "FILM-BOPP-20",
        "productName": "BOPP Printed Film",
        "qty": 1000,
        "uom": "kg",
        "status": "planned",
        "jobOrderIds": [
          "665f2b2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c2a"
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

item.name: GET  Check availability for a sales order
GET  List the current operator's jobs

query.description: Filter to jobs whose named stage is in_progress or ready
Filter to jobs with a stage assigned to this operator
Filter to jobs with a stage on this machine
Search order number, job number, product sku/name, or customer

request.description:
Creates a JobOrder from a sales-order line (or ad-hoc), auto-generating orderNumber (PB-###) and jobNumber (JOB-####) and seeding one StageExecution per fixed stage (first stage 'ready'). Idempotent per SO line (returns existing active job with 200). Links back to the SO line, writes an AuditLog, invalidates job_orders cache, emits an order-update socket event, and returns 201 for new jobs.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `production:create`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f2b2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c2a",
    "orderNumber": "PB-001",
    "jobNumber": "JOB-7845",
    "source": "sales_order",
    "product": {
      "sku": "FILM-BOPP-20",
      "name": "BOPP Printed Film"
    },
    "plannedQty": 1000,
    "uom": "kg",
    "priority": "high",
    "plantId": "665f0000000000000000aaaa",
    "status": "planned",
    "currentStageIndex": 0,
    "stages": [
      {
        "_id": "665f2b2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c39",
        "stage": "extrusion",
        "sequence": 1,
        "status": "ready"
      },
      {
        "_id": "665f2b2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c3a",
        "stage": "printing",
        "sequence": 2,
        "status": "pending"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

item.name: GET  Get a job order by id

request.description:
Sets/updates plannedStart, plannedEnd, dueDate and priority on a job. Auto-promotes a draft job to 'planned' when a plannedStart is set; rejects completed/cancelled jobs. Writes an AuditLog, invalidates job_orders cache, and emits an order-update socket event.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `production:update`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f2b2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c2a",
    "orderNumber": "PB-001",
    "status": "planned",
    "priority": "high",
    "plannedStart": "2026-07-14T06:00:00.000Z",
    "plannedEnd": "2026-07-16T18:00:00.000Z",
    "dueDate": "2026-07-18T00:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

item.name: POST  Release a job order to production

variable.description: Stage subdocument id within the job

request.description:
Pre-assigns operator, team, machine and/or plannedStart to a stage during planning; passing null clears a field. Promotes a pending stage to 'ready' only if it now has an operator/machine and all prior stages are done. Writes an AuditLog, invalidates job_orders cache, and emits an order-update socket event.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `production:update`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f2b2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c2a",
    "orderNumber": "PB-001",
    "status": "planned",
    "stages": [
      {
        "_id": "665f2b2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c3a",
        "stage": "printing",
        "sequence": 2,
        "status": "pending",
        "operatorId": "665f0000000000000000bbbb",
        "machineId": "665f0000000000000000cccc"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

item.name: POST  Confirm materials received for a stage

variable.description: Stage subdocument id within the job
Stage subdocument id within the job

request.description:
Starts a stage: sets machine/operator, weight-in (defaults to previous stage's weight-out or the job's input roll weight), status -> in_progress and startedAt. Enforces sequential gating (E_STAGE_BLOCKED) and materials confirmation for non-inspection stages (E_MATERIALS_NOT_CONFIRMED); promotes the job to in_progress and sets the assigned machine's status to running. Emits an order-update socket event.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `production:execute`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f2b2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c2a",
    "orderNumber": "PB-001",
    "status": "in_progress",
    "actualStart": "2026-07-13T08:10:00.000Z",
    "currentStageIndex": 0,
    "stages": [
      {
        "_id": "665f2b2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c39",
        "stage": "extrusion",
        "status": "in_progress",
        "machineId": "665f0000000000000000cccc",
        "weightInKg": 1100,
        "startedAt": "2026-07-13T08:10:00.000Z"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

variable.description: Stage subdocument id within the job

request.description:
Completes an in-progress stage: records weight-out/rejects/materials/QC results, computes durationSec, decrements inventory (INV OUT movements, rollback on failure) for materials with an itemId, and advances the workflow — promotes the next stage to ready (or sets qc_hold on fail/rework/hold, or completes the job). Updates job rollups, releases the machine, creates a Notification, writes an AuditLog, invalidates job_orders cache, and emits order-update + notification socket events.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `production:execute`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f2b2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c2a",
    "orderNumber": "PB-001",
    "status": "in_progress",
    "currentStageIndex": 1,
    "totalProducedKg": 1050,
    "totalRejectsKg": 5,
    "stages": [
      {
        "stage": "extrusion",
        "status": "completed",
        "weightInKg": 1100,
        "weightOutKg": 1050,
        "durationSec": 10800
      },
      {
        "stage": "printing",
        "status": "ready",
        "weightInKg": 1050
      }
    ],
    "_nextStageName": "printing"
  }
}
```

query.description: Free-text search across poNumber and supplier.

request.description:
Paginated list of purchase orders. Filters: status, supplier (case-insensitive), and free-text q on poNumber/supplier. Scoped to the caller's plantId. Sorted by createdAt descending.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `purchase_orders:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "665f1a2b9c1e4a0012ab34cd",
      "poNumber": "GRN-LX9K2P",
      "supplier": "Acme Polymers Pvt Ltd",
      "status": "received",
      "receivedAt": "2026-07-10T09:30:00.000Z",
      "lines": [
        {
          "sku": "RM-LDPE-01",
          "name": "LDPE Granules",
          "qty": 500,
          "uom": "kg",
          "unitCost": 85,
          "lineTotal": 42500,
          "receivedQty": 500,
          "status": "received"
        }
      ],
      "totalValue": 42500,
      "currency": "INR",
      "source": "manual"
    }
  ]
}
```

Up to 20 active items whose onHand is below reorderLevel (reorderLevel > 0), sorted by onHand ascending. Each includes suggestedOrderQty (reorderLevel x 2) and shortfall. Optionally scoped by plantId, else the caller's plant.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `purchase_orders:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "665f1c3d9c1e4a0012ab5678",
      "sku": "RM-LDPE-01",
      "name": "LDPE Granules",
      "onHand": 120,
      "reorderLevel": 500,
      "uom": "kg",
      "suggestedOrderQty": 1000,
      "shortfall": 380
    }
  ]
}
```

Returns a single purchase order by _id. 404 if not found.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `purchase_orders:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f1a2b9c1e4a0012ab34cd",
    "poNumber": "GRN-LX9K2P",
    "supplier": "Acme Polymers Pvt Ltd",
    "status": "received",
    "receivedAt": "2026-07-10T09:30:00.000Z",
    "lines": [
      {
        "sku": "RM-LDPE-01",
        "name": "LDPE Granules",
        "qty": 500,
        "uom": "kg",
        "unitCost": 85,
        "lineTotal": 42500,
        "grns": [
          {
            "receivedAt": "2026-07-10T09:30:00.000Z",
            "qty": 500,
            "vehicleNumber": "MH12AB1234",
            "invoiceNumber": "INV-2026-0042"
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "totalValue": 42500,
    "currency": "INR"
  }
}
```

Creates a PO and receives stock in one operation. SIDE EFFECTS: per line it upserts the InventoryItem by SKU and increments onHand; writes an InventoryMovement of type 'IN'; records a GRN; sets PO status 'received'; writes an AuditLog; invalidates 'purchase_orders'+'inventory' caches; emits 'po:update'. Manual rollback if the PO save fails. poNumber must be unique (409); auto-generated as GRN-<base36> if omitted. Response adds inventoryUpdates and a message.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `purchase_orders:create`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f1a2b9c1e4a0012ab34cd",
    "poNumber": "GRN-2026-0042",
    "supplier": "Acme Polymers Pvt Ltd",
    "status": "received",
    "lines": [
      {
        "sku": "RM-LDPE-01",
        "name": "LDPE Granules",
        "qty": 500,
        "uom": "kg",
        "unitCost": 85,
        "lineTotal": 42500,
        "receivedQty": 500
      }
    ],
    "totalValue": 42500,
    "currency": "INR",
    "inventoryUpdates": [
      {
        "sku": "RM-LDPE-01",
        "name": "LDPE Granules",
        "qtyAdded": 500,
        "newOnHand": 620,
        "uom": "kg",
        "wasNewItem": false
      }
    ],
    "message": "✓ Created PO GRN-2026-0042. Updated 1 inventory item(s)."
  }
}
```

body.raw:
{
  "poNumber": "GRN-2026-0042",
  "supplier": "Acme Polymers Pvt Ltd",
  "invoiceNumber": "INV-2026-0042",
  "vehicleNumber": "MH12AB1234",
  "receivedAt": "2026-07-10T09:30:00.000Z",
  "notes": "Received in good condition",
  "lines": [
    {
      "sku": "RM-LDPE-01",
      "name": "LDPE Granules",
      "qty": 500,
      "uom": "kg",
      "unitCost": 85,
      "itemType": "raw"
    }
  ]
}

query.description: Free-text search across productSku, productName, externalId.

request.description:
Paginated list of Bills of Materials, sorted by updatedAt descending. Filters: active flag, product SKU prefix, and free-text search across productSku, productName, externalId. No side effects.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `inventory:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "665f0a1b2c3d4e5f60718500",
      "productSku": "LAM-PET-12",
      "productName": "PET Laminate",
      "version": 3,
      "active": true,
      "outputQty": 1000,
      "outputUom": "kg",
      "externalId": "ERP-BOM-4471",
      "components": [
        {
          "sku": "FILM-BOPP-20",
          "name": "BOPP Film 20 micron",
          "qty": 0.6,
          "uom": "kg",
          "scrapPct": 5
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

variable.description: BOM ObjectId or a product SKU (uppercased).

request.description:
Fetches a single BOM by ObjectId, or by product SKU (uppercased) returning the latest active version. 404 if no BOM matches. No side effects.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `inventory:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f0a1b2c3d4e5f60718500",
    "productSku": "LAM-PET-12",
    "productName": "PET Laminate",
    "version": 3,
    "active": true,
    "outputQty": 1000,
    "outputUom": "kg",
    "components": [
      {
        "sku": "FILM-BOPP-20",
        "name": "BOPP Film 20 micron",
        "qty": 0.6,
        "uom": "kg",
        "scrapPct": 5
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

query.description: Target output quantity; must be > 0. Defaults to 1.
Filter by status (issued, partial, consumed, cancelled).

request.description:
Paginated list of material issue records, filterable by status, job order, issuee, team, stage, and issue-date range. Sorted by issuedAt descending. Read-only.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `inventory:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "66900aa1b2c3d4e5f6070809",
      "issueNumber": "MI-LXY8Z3A",
      "jobOrderNumber": "JO-2026-0042",
      "stage": "printing",
      "issuedToName": "Ravi Kumar",
      "machineCode": "PRINT-01",
      "items": [
        {
          "sku": "INK-CYAN-01",
          "name": "Cyan Ink",
          "issuedQty": 25,
          "uom": "kg",
          "unitCost": 120,
          "consumedQty": 0,
          "returnedQty": 0
        }
      ],
      "totalValue": 3000,
      "status": "issued",
      "issuedAt": "2026-07-13T09:30:00.000Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

item.name: GET  Get a material issue by id

request.description:
Returns a single material issue document by ObjectId. 404 if not found. Read-only.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `inventory:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "66900aa1b2c3d4e5f6070809",
    "issueNumber": "MI-LXY8Z3A",
    "jobOrderNumber": "JO-2026-0042",
    "stage": "printing",
    "issuedToName": "Ravi Kumar",
    "items": [
      {
        "sku": "INK-CYAN-01",
        "name": "Cyan Ink",
        "issuedQty": 25,
        "uom": "kg",
        "consumedQty": 0
      }
    ],
    "totalValue": 3000,
    "status": "issued",
    "issuedAt": "2026-07-13T09:30:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

Issues inventory items to a person/stage for a job order. Pre-checks stock for every line (422 E_INSUFFICIENT_STOCK before any write), then atomically decrements onHand per SKU (409 E_RACE on conflict), writes an OUT InventoryMovement per line, creates the MaterialIssue (status 'issued'), writes an AuditLog, invalidates caches, and emits 'material-issue:new'. Rolls back on failure. Either issuedToUserId or issuedToName is required. Returns 201.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `inventory:create`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "66900aa1b2c3d4e5f6070809",
    "issueNumber": "MI-LXY8Z3A",
    "jobOrderNumber": "JO-2026-0042",
    "stage": "printing",
    "issuedToName": "Ravi Kumar",
    "items": [
      {
        "sku": "INK-CYAN-01",
        "name": "Cyan Ink",
        "issuedQty": 25,
        "uom": "kg",
        "unitCost": 120
      }
    ],
    "totalValue": 3000,
    "status": "issued",
    "issuedAt": "2026-07-13T09:30:00.000Z",
    "message": "✓ Issued 1 item(s) to Ravi Kumar. Inventory updated."
  }
}
```

item.name: POST  Report consumption for an issue

request.description:
Operator reports outcome at end of stage. Only for status issued/partial (else 400). Per line, consumedQty + returnedQty + scrapQty must equal issuedQty. Side effects: consumed logged as ADJUST (bookkeeping); returned ADDED back to inventory (IN movement); scrap logged as negative ADJUST. Status becomes 'consumed' or 'partial'. Writes AuditLog, invalidates caches, emits 'material-issue:update'. Rolls back on error.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `inventory:update`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "66900aa1b2c3d4e5f6070809",
    "issueNumber": "MI-LXY8Z3A",
    "stage": "printing",
    "status": "consumed",
    "items": [
      {
        "sku": "INK-CYAN-01",
        "issuedQty": 25,
        "consumedQty": 20,
        "returnedQty": 4,
        "scrapQty": 1
      }
    ],
    "consumedAt": "2026-07-13T15:45:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

item.name: POST  Cancel an issue and return stock
GET  Suggest BOM-derived materials for a stage

query.description: (required) Stage subdocument _id within the job order

request.description:
Computes suggested material quantities for a job order stage from the job's bomSnapshot (falling back to a live BOM lookup). Requires jobOrderId and stageId (else 400); 404 if job/stage not found. Subtracts already-added and already-requested quantities; returns only positive remaining suggestions.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "sku": "INK-CYAN-01",
      "name": "Cyan Ink",
      "qtySuggested": 24.5,
      "qtyAlreadyAdded": 0,
      "qtyAlreadyRequested": 0.5,
      "uom": "kg",
      "itemId": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c5c",
      "currentAvailable": 180,
      "fromBom": true
    }
  ]
}
```

Operator submits a material request for a job order stage. Validates the job order and stage exist (else 404). Creates a MaterialRequest (status 'pending'), denormalizing job/product/customer/stage/requester context. Side effect: creates a Notification for the inventory team and emits 'notification:new'. Returns 201.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "66900bb2c3d4e5f607080910",
    "jobOrderNumber": "JO-2026-0042",
    "productName": "BOPP Film 20 micron",
    "stageName": "printing",
    "requestedByName": "Ravi Kumar",
    "priority": "urgent",
    "lines": [
      {
        "sku": "INK-CYAN-01",
        "name": "Cyan Ink",
        "qtyRequested": 25,
        "uom": "kg",
        "qtyIssued": 0
      }
    ],
    "status": "pending",
    "createdAt": "2026-07-13T08:15:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

Cancels a pending material request (only status 'pending', else 409). Only the original requester or an admin may cancel (else 403). Sets status 'cancelled'. No inventory side effects.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "66900bb2c3d4e5f607080910",
    "jobOrderNumber": "JO-2026-0042",
    "stageName": "printing",
    "requestedByName": "Ravi Kumar",
    "status": "cancelled"
  }
}
```

query.description: Filter by status (pending, partial, issued, rejected, cancelled).
When 'true', restrict to the caller's own requests.

request.description:
Lists material requests (max 200, sorted by priority then createdAt desc). Users with inventory:view (or *:*) see all plant requests; others are restricted to their own submissions (mine=true forces self-scope). Each line is enriched with current stock (currentOnHand, currentAvailable, sufficient, unitCost). Read-only.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "66900bb2c3d4e5f607080910",
      "jobOrderNumber": "JO-2026-0042",
      "stageName": "printing",
      "requestedByName": "Ravi Kumar",
      "priority": "urgent",
      "status": "pending",
      "lines": [
        {
          "sku": "INK-CYAN-01",
          "name": "Cyan Ink",
          "qtyRequested": 25,
          "uom": "kg",
          "qtyIssued": 0,
          "currentOnHand": 200,
          "currentAvailable": 180,
          "sufficient": true,
          "unitCost": 120
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

item.name: GET  Get a material request by id

request.description:
Returns a single material request by ObjectId. 404 if not found. Read-only (lines returned as stored, without the list endpoint's stock enrichment).

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "66900bb2c3d4e5f607080910",
    "jobOrderNumber": "JO-2026-0042",
    "productName": "BOPP Film 20 micron",
    "stageName": "printing",
    "requestedByName": "Ravi Kumar",
    "priority": "urgent",
    "lines": [
      {
        "sku": "INK-CYAN-01",
        "name": "Cyan Ink",
        "qtyRequested": 25,
        "uom": "kg",
        "qtyIssued": 0
      }
    ],
    "status": "pending"
  }
}
```

Inventory clerk fulfils a request. Only for status pending/partial (else 409). Optional body specifies per-SKU issued quantities; if omitted, each line issues its remaining requested qty. Validates stock (400 E_NO_ITEM / E_LOW_STOCK). Side effects per issued line: creates an InventoryMovement 'ISSUE_TO_PROD', decrements onHand, pushes the material into the JobOrder stage's materialsAdded[]. Status becomes 'issued' or 'partial'. Notifies the operator (non-fatal).

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `inventory:update`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "66900bb2c3d4e5f607080910",
    "jobOrderNumber": "JO-2026-0042",
    "stageName": "printing",
    "requestedByName": "Ravi Kumar",
    "lines": [
      {
        "sku": "INK-CYAN-01",
        "name": "Cyan Ink",
        "qtyRequested": 25,
        "uom": "kg",
        "qtyIssued": 25
      }
    ],
    "status": "issued",
    "issuedAt": "2026-07-13T09:30:00.000Z",
    "issuedByName": "store.clerk@sanmati.com"
  }
}
```

Inventory clerk rejects a request. Only for status pending/partial (else 409). Requires a non-empty reason. Sets status 'rejected' and stores rejectionReason. No inventory side effects.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `inventory:update`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "66900bb2c3d4e5f607080910",
    "jobOrderNumber": "JO-2026-0042",
    "stageName": "printing",
    "requestedByName": "Ravi Kumar",
    "status": "rejected",
    "rejectionReason": "Out of stock; awaiting supplier delivery"
  }
}
```

query.description: Filter by machine stage (printing, inspection, lamination, slitting, cutting, packaging).
Filter by current status state (running, idle, down, maintenance, offline).
Case-insensitive search over machine code and name.

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of machines sorted by code ascending. Filterable by plantId, stage, current state (matched on currentStatus.state), and a free-text query q that regex-matches code or name. Read-only. Response includes pagination meta (page, limit, total, pages).

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `machines:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",
      "code": "PRNT-1",
      "name": "Printing Line 1",
      "stage": "printing",
      "plantId": "665f0000111122223333aaaa",
      "idealCycleTimeSec": 1,
      "targetOutputPerHour": 1200,
      "apiKeyPrefix": "mk_ab12cd",
      "active": true,
      "currentStatus": {
        "state": "running",
        "lastSeenAt": "2026-07-13T09:58:00.000Z"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

item.name: GET  Live status summary for all machines

query.description: Restrict to a single plant's active machines.

item.name: GET  Get one machine with live IoT data merged

request.description:
Returns a single machine by id (404 if not found). Merges in the most recently seen DeviceData row (matched on machineName === machine code) as currentStatus.live, and enriches currentStatus with lastSeenAt, deviceId, updateCount, and currentStateSince (start of the current MachineStatus interval, for the live 'Down for X' timer). Read-only.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `machines:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",
    "code": "PRNT-1",
    "name": "Printing Line 1",
    "stage": "printing",
    "plantId": "665f0000111122223333aaaa",
    "targetOutputPerHour": 1200,
    "apiKeyPrefix": "mk_ab12cd",
    "active": true,
    "currentStatus": {
      "state": "running",
      "live": {
        "speed": 57,
        "temp": 42.3,
        "production": 45
      },
      "lastSeenAt": "2026-07-13T09:59:55.000Z",
      "deviceId": "gw-esp32-01",
      "updateCount": 8421,
      "currentStateSince": "2026-07-13T09:30:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}
```

Partially updates a machine by id. Accepts any subset of the create fields EXCEPT code (immutable). Returns the updated document (404 if not found). Invalidates the 'machines' cache.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `machines:update`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",
    "code": "PRNT-1",
    "name": "Printing Line 1 (rebuilt)",
    "stage": "printing",
    "plantId": "665f0000111122223333aaaa",
    "targetOutputPerHour": 1400,
    "apiKeyPrefix": "mk_ab12cd",
    "currentStatus": {
      "state": "running"
    }
  }
}
```

item.name: POST  Rotate a machine's API key

request.description:
Generates a new API key for the machine (updating apiKeyHash/apiKeyPrefix/apiKeyRotatedAt; 404 if not found). Returns the new raw key EXACTLY ONCE. The old key is invalidated immediately. Body is ignored.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `machines:update`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "apiKey": "mk_xz88qq_71ka0slm29fk30dslapq1",
    "apiKeyPrefix": "mk_xz88qq",
    "rotatedAt": "2026-07-13T10:05:00.000Z",
    "warning": "Save this API key now — it will never be shown again."
  }
}
```

query.description: (required) Window upper bound (ISO). Must be >= from and within 7 days.

item.name: GET  Paginated IoT ingestion audit log

variable.description: Machine _id; resolved to its code for the join.

request.description:
Returns OEERollup buckets for the machine at the requested granularity within [from, to], sorted by bucketStart ascending. from and to are REQUIRED. Read-only.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `reports:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "665fbb0000000000000000cc",
      "machineId": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",
      "granularity": "hour",
      "bucketStart": "2026-07-13T09:00:00.000Z",
      "availability": 0.92,
      "performance": 0.87,
      "quality": 0.98,
      "oee": 0.784
    }
  ]
}
```

query.description: Window lower bound (ISO); defaults to now minus 24 hours.
Window upper bound (ISO); defaults to now.

request.description:
Returns MachineStatus intervals overlapping the requested window, sorted by startAt descending. Each row is {state, startAt, endAt, durationSec} (endAt null = currently open). If from/to are omitted, defaults to the last 24 hours. Read-only.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `machines:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "665fcc0000000000000000dd",
      "machineId": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",
      "state": "running",
      "startAt": "2026-07-13T09:30:00.000Z",
      "endAt": null,
      "durationSec": 0
    }
  ]
}
```

Records a quality check. Validation: passedQty + rejectedQty + reworkQty must not exceed sampledQty (400). Runs in a transaction. SIDE EFFECTS: sets inspector to the caller; increments the ProductionOrder's totalRejects/totalRework; if decision='rework' and reworkQty>0 creates a linked rework ProductionOrder; writes an AuditLog; invalidates 'dashboard' cache; emits a QC alert socket event.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `qc:create`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f3b229c1e4a0012ab8001",
    "orderId": "665f2a119c1e4a0012ab7001",
    "stage": "printing",
    "sampledQty": 100,
    "passedQty": 95,
    "rejectedQty": 3,
    "reworkQty": 2,
    "decision": "rework",
    "inspector": "665f0bb29c1e4a0012ab0002",
    "checkedAt": "2026-07-12T11:20:00.000Z",
    "reworkOrderId": "665f3c339c1e4a0012ab8100"
  }
}
```

body.raw:
{
  "orderId": "665f2a119c1e4a0012ab7001",
  "stage": "printing",
  "machineId": "665f0dd49c1e4a0012ab0004",
  "plantId": "665f0aa19c1e4a0012ab0001",
  "sampledQty": 100,
  "passedQty": 95,
  "rejectedQty": 3,
  "reworkQty": 2,
  "defects": [
    {
      "code": "SMUDGE",
      "severity": "minor",
      "qty": 3,
      "notes": "Ink smudge on edge"
    }
  ],
  "decision": "rework",
  "notes": "Send rework batch back to printing"
}

query.description: Free-text search on sku and name.
Filter by category (raw, consumable, packaging, finished_good).
Only items below their reorder level.

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of active inventory items, each enriched with a computed `available` (onHand - reserved) and `belowReorder` flag. Supports free-text search on sku/name, category filter (mapped to the DB `type`), and lowStockOnly. Sorted by name ascending. No side effects.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `inventory:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "665f0a1b2c3d4e5f60718200",
      "sku": "FILM-BOPP-20",
      "name": "BOPP Film 20 micron",
      "type": "raw",
      "uom": "kg",
      "onHand": 1500,
      "reserved": 200,
      "reorderLevel": 80,
      "unitCost": 145.5,
      "location": "WH-A-01",
      "supplier": "Reliance Polymers",
      "active": true,
      "available": 1300,
      "belowReorder": false
    }
  ]
}
```

query.description: Filter by movement type (IN / OUT / ADJUST / SCRAP).

request.description:
Paginated, filterable list of stock movements for an item (SKU or ObjectId), sorted by occurredAt descending (default 50). Enriched with performer name/email and a description; movements tied to issues include a relatedIssue block. No side effects.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `inventory:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "665f0a1b2c3d4e5f60718300",
      "sku": "FILM-BOPP-20",
      "type": "OUT",
      "qty": 120,
      "balanceAfter": 1380,
      "reference": {
        "kind": "material_issue",
        "id": "MI-0042"
      },
      "occurredAt": "2026-07-12T10:15:00.000Z",
      "performedByName": "Ravi Kumar",
      "description": "Issued to Ravi Kumar for slitting (JO-1024)"
    }
  ]
}
```

Active items with reorderLevel > 0 whose onHand is below reorderLevel, scoped to the principal's plant, sorted by onHand ascending. No side effects.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `inventory:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "665f0a1b2c3d4e5f60718201",
      "sku": "INK-CYAN-01",
      "name": "Cyan Solvent Ink",
      "type": "consumable",
      "uom": "kg",
      "onHand": 15,
      "reorderLevel": 50,
      "reorderQty": 100,
      "active": true
    }
  ]
}
```

Creates a new inventory item. The UI category (raw/consumable/packaging/finished_good) is mapped to the DB `type`. sku is uppercased. Rejects 409 if sku+plantId already exists. Side effects: creates the item, writes an AuditLog (inventory.create), invalidates the 'inventory' cache. Returns 201.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `inventory:create`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f0a1b2c3d4e5f60718200",
    "sku": "FILM-BOPP-20",
    "name": "BOPP Film 20 micron",
    "type": "raw",
    "uom": "kg",
    "onHand": 1500,
    "reorderLevel": 80,
    "unitCost": 145.5,
    "plantId": "665f0a1b2c3d4e5f6071aaaa",
    "active": true,
    "createdAt": "2026-07-13T09:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

Updates a whitelisted set of fields. Special handling for onHand: if the new onHand differs from current, an ADJUST InventoryMovement is created (reference.kind 'manual'). Side effects: saves the item, may create a stock movement, writes an AuditLog (inventory.update), invalidates the 'inventory' cache. Response includes `_movementLogged`. 404 if not found.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `inventory:update`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f0a1b2c3d4e5f60718200",
    "sku": "FILM-BOPP-20",
    "name": "BOPP Film 20 micron",
    "type": "raw",
    "uom": "kg",
    "onHand": 1600,
    "reorderLevel": 100,
    "unitCost": 150,
    "active": true,
    "_movementLogged": true
  }
}
```

Records a manual stock movement (RECEIPT, CONSUMPTION, ADJUSTMENT, or SCRAP) within a transaction. RECEIPT adds qty to onHand; other types subtract the absolute qty (floored at 0). Side effects: updates onHand, creates an InventoryMovement (with balanceAfter, performedBy), invalidates the 'inventory' cache. 404 if the item does not exist.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `inventory:create`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f0a1b2c3d4e5f60718301",
    "sku": "FILM-BOPP-20",
    "itemId": "665f0a1b2c3d4e5f60718200",
    "type": "RECEIPT",
    "qty": 500,
    "reference": {
      "kind": "manual",
      "id": "PO-9981"
    },
    "balanceAfter": 2000,
    "occurredAt": "2026-07-13T09:45:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

Updates a dispatch's status (404 if not found). SIDE EFFECTS: sets status; optionally sets eWayBill/invoice; sets actualDispatchAt=now when status='dispatched' and deliveredAt=now when status='delivered'; emits a dispatch alert socket event.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `dispatch:update`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f4a559c1e4a0012ab9001",
    "dispatchNumber": "DSP-2026-0007",
    "status": "dispatched",
    "eWayBill": "EWB-9988776655",
    "invoice": "INV-2026-0155",
    "actualDispatchAt": "2026-07-13T09:15:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

Returns a single integration by id, serialized via toClientJSON() (no secrets). 404 if not found.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `integrations:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "66f0e444f5a6b7c8d9e00044",
    "name": "SAP Sales Sync",
    "slug": "sap-sales-sync",
    "module": "sales_orders",
    "baseUrl": "https://erp.example.com/api",
    "active": true
  }
}
```

Runs the sync immediately and synchronously for instant feedback. On failure returns 400 (E_INTEGRATION_SYNC).

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `integrations:update`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "fetched": 12,
    "upserted": 12,
    "errors": 0,
    "durationMs": 843
  }
}
```

item.name: GET  List permission modules and actions

request.description:
Returns the full list of permission MODULES and ACTIONS available in the system, used to build role permission matrices.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `roles:view`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "modules": [
      "employees",
      "roles",
      "teams",
      "reports",
      "integrations",
      "inventory",
      "bom",
      "sales_orders",
      "purchase_orders"
    ],
    "actions": [
      "view",
      "create",
      "update",
      "delete"
    ]
  }
}
```

query.description: Full-text search across indexed user fields.
Filter by user status (active, inactive, suspended).

request.description:
Creates a new user. Password required (min 8 chars) — 400 if missing — hashed with argon2id. Returns the created user via toSafeJSON() (no passwordHash). Returns 201.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `employees:create`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "66f0a123b4c5d6e7f8012399",
    "employeeCode": "EMP-1099",
    "name": "Sita Devi",
    "email": "sita@sanmati.com",
    "roles": [
      "66f0c222d3e4f5a6b7c80022"
    ],
    "shift": "B",
    "status": "active"
  }
}
```

Partially updates a user (all fields optional). 404 if not found. If password is provided it is re-hashed (argon2id) and tokenVersion is incremented (invalidating existing access tokens). Returns the updated user via toSafeJSON().

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `employees:update`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "66f0a123b4c5d6e7f8012399",
    "employeeCode": "EMP-1099",
    "name": "Sita Devi",
    "email": "sita@sanmati.com",
    "shift": "C",
    "status": "suspended"
  }
}
```

Creates a new team. Slug must match /^[a-z0-9_-]+$/ and type must be an allowed enum. Returns 201.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `teams:create`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "66f0d333e4f5a6b7c8d90034",
    "name": "Dispatch Crew",
    "slug": "dispatch-crew",
    "type": "dispatch",
    "leader": "66f0a123b4c5d6e7f8012345"
  }
}
```

Partially updates a team (all fields optional). 404 if not found. Returns the updated document.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer  
**Required permission:** `teams:update`

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "66f0d333e4f5a6b7c8d90034",
    "name": "Dispatch Crew",
    "slug": "dispatch-crew",
    "type": "dispatch",
    "description": "Night dispatch crew"
  }
}
```

item.name: POST  Ingest telemetry events for a machine (by URL code)

variable.description: Machine code identifying the target machine.
Machine code identifying the target machine.

item.name: GET  IoT credential health check (by URL code)

variable.description: Machine code identifying the target machine.

item.name: POST  Ingest telemetry events (machine from body/header)
GET  IoT credential health check (machine from body/header)
POST  Ingest open device data (no auth)

request.description:
Unauthenticated, schema-less device ingestion. Requires deviceId (or device_id) and machineName (or machine_name / machineCode) — 400 if either missing. machineName is uppercased. Identifier/hint fields are stripped; the rest become the device data payload. Side effects: (1) UPSERTS one DeviceData row per deviceId ($inc updateCount); (2) appends a DeviceDataHistory audit row; (3) AUTO-REGISTERS a Machine if none exists with code === machineName (generates an API key); (4) AUTO-TRACKS state intervals via MachineStatus (closes the old interval and opens a new one on change).

**Auth:** Public (no auth)

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "deviceId": "gw-esp32-01",
    "machineName": "PRNT-1",
    "machineId": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",
    "machineCreated": false,
    "stateChanged": true,
    "updatedAt": "2026-07-13T10:00:00.000Z",
    "updateCount": 8422,
    "fieldsReceived": [
      "state",
      "speed",
      "temp",
      "production"
    ]
  }
}
```

item.name: GET  List current device states (no auth)

query.description: Filter to one machine code (uppercased, exact match).
Return only devices not seen within the last N minutes.

request.description:
Returns up to 500 current DeviceData rows sorted by lastSeenAt descending. Optional filters: machineName (uppercased, exact) and staleMinutes (only devices not seen within the last N minutes). Read-only.

**Auth:** Public (no auth)

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "665fdd0000000000000000ee",
      "deviceId": "gw-esp32-01",
      "machineName": "PRNT-1",
      "data": {
        "state": "running",
        "speed": 57,
        "temp": 42.3,
        "production": 45
      },
      "lastSeenAt": "2026-07-13T10:00:00.000Z",
      "lastClientIp": "10.0.0.42",
      "updateCount": 8422
    }
  ]
}
```

item.name: GET  Get current state for one device (no auth)

request.description:
Returns the current DeviceData row for the given deviceId (404 if none exists). Read-only.

**Auth:** Public (no auth)

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "665fdd0000000000000000ee",
    "deviceId": "gw-esp32-01",
    "machineName": "PRNT-1",
    "data": {
      "state": "running",
      "speed": 57,
      "temp": 42.3,
      "production": 45
    },
    "lastSeenAt": "2026-07-13T10:00:00.000Z",
    "updateCount": 8422
  }
}
```

item.name: GET  Get recent history rows for one device (no auth)

variable.description: Device/gateway id whose history to fetch.

item.name: DELETE  Delete a device's current row (no auth)

variable.description: Device/gateway id whose current row to delete.

request.description:
Ping for external systems to verify their API key. Requires a valid X-API-Key header (resolves req.integration + plant). Returns plant name/id, authenticated=true, and server time.

**Auth:** X-API-Key (integration)

**Example response (200):**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "status": "ok",
    "plant": "Sanmati Plant 1",
    "plantId": "66f0a0001111222233334444",
    "authenticated": true,
    "serverTime": "2026-07-13T07:50:00.000Z"
  }
}
```
